MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart is present. Represented by Janet Thompson.
Attorney John Zahghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Keith Hines is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-07-2013 is vacated.
